name: AnimeAV1 (scraping directo)
description: Reproduce anime desde AnimeAV1 sin backend externo
author: TuNombre
payload: class Provider{getSettings(){return{episodeServers:["animeav1"],supportsDub:true}}async search(opts){const query=encodeURIComponent(opts.query);const url=`https://animeav1.com/search?q=${query}`;const res=await fetch(url);if(!res.ok)return[];const html=await res.text();const doc=new DOMParser().parseFromString(html,"text/html");const items=doc.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/anime/"]');const results=[];for(const a of items){const title=a.textContent.trim();const href=a.getAttribute("href");if(!href||!title)continue;const match=href.match(/\/anime\/([^\/]+)/);if(match){results.push({id:match[1],title:title,url:`https://animeav1.com${href}`,subOrDub:"both"})}}return results.slice(0,20)}async findEpisodes(id){const url=`https://animeav1.com/anime/${id}`;const res=await fetch(url);if(!res.ok)throw new Error("No se pudo cargar la página del anime");const html=await res.text();const doc=new DOMParser().parseFromString(html,"text/html");const epLinks=doc.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/ver/"]');const episodes=[];for(const a of epLinks){const href=a.getAttribute("href");const text=a.textContent.trim();const numMatch=text.match(/\d+/);const number=numMatch?parseInt(numMatch[0]):0;if(href&&href.startsWith("/ver/")){episodes.push({id:href,number:number,url:`https://animeav1.com${href}`,title:text||`Episodio ${number}`})}}episodes.sort((a,b)=>a.number-b.number);return episodes}async findEpisodeServer(episode,server){const episodeUrl=episode.url;if(!episodeUrl)throw new Error("URL del episodio no disponible");const res=await fetch(episodeUrl);if(!res.ok)throw new Error("No se pudo cargar la página del episodio");const html=await res.text();const doc=new DOMParser().parseFromString(html,"text/html");let iframeSrc=null;const iframe=doc.querySelector('iframe#player, iframe.player, iframe[src*="embed"]');if(iframe){iframeSrc=iframe.getAttribute("src")}if(!iframeSrc){const links=doc.querySelectorAll('a[href*="embed"], a[href*="player"]');for(const a of links){const href=a.getAttribute("href");if(href&&(href.includes("embed")||href.includes("player"))){iframeSrc=href;break}}}if(!iframeSrc){throw new Error("No se encontró el reproductor en la página")}if(iframeSrc.startsWith("/")){iframeSrc=`https://animeav1.com${iframeSrc}`}else if(!iframeSrc.startsWith("http")){iframeSrc=`https://animeav1.com/${iframeSrc}`}try{const iframeRes=await fetch(iframeSrc);const iframeHtml=await iframeRes.text();const iframeDoc=new DOMParser().parseFromString(iframeHtml,"text/html");const video=iframeDoc.querySelector("video");if(video){const src=video.getAttribute("src");if(src){const absoluteSrc=src.startsWith("http")?src:new URL(src,iframeSrc).href;const type=src.endsWith(".m3u8")?"m3u8":"mp4";return{server:server||"animeav1",headers:{"Referer":"https://animeav1.com/"},videoSources:[{url:absoluteSrc,type:type,quality:"HD",subtitles:[]}]}}}const sources=iframeDoc.querySelectorAll("source");if(sources.length>0){const src=sources[0].getAttribute("src");if(src){const absoluteSrc=src.startsWith("http")?src:new URL(src,iframeSrc).href;const type=src.endsWith(".m3u8")?"m3u8":"mp4";return{server:server||"animeav1",headers:{"Referer":"https://animeav1.com/"},videoSources:[{url:absoluteSrc,type:type,quality:"HD",subtitles:[]}]}}}}catch(e){ }return{server:server||"animeav1",headers:{"Referer":"https://animeav1.com/"},videoSources:[{url:iframeSrc,type:"iframe",quality:"HD",subtitles:[]}]}}}
